run_id.description: The run to watch. Its journal record supplies ssh_target + remote_path.
run_id.title: Run Id

action.description: install (default) runs the probe ladder; uninstall reverses it; status reports what is currently installed.
action.title: Action

scheduler.description: Backend/scheduler name — gates the scrontab rung (Slurm only) and supplies the submit binary for the self-resubmitting-job rung, both through the backend seam (never a concrete-backend import).
scheduler.title: Scheduler

stale_sec.description: Alarm threshold: the watcher raises an ALARM when the client's .hpc_last_read marker is missing or older than this many seconds.
stale_sec.title: Stale Sec

interval_min.description: How often the watcher fires (minutes) — the cron/scrontab cadence and the self-resubmitting job's sleep interval.
interval_min.title: Interval Min
